title: Ship adaptive built-in memory decay CLI
description: Complete the existing uncommitted adaptive memory scoring work by adding decay/reinforce commands, metadata stored outside MEMORY.md/USER.md, tests, and CLI verification. This helps keep long-lived Hermes memory useful without mutating prompt-facing memory format.

title: Move auto-improvement artifacts out of repository root
description: Store IDEAS/PLAN/TASKS/TEST reports under a generated reports directory or gitignored workspace path to reduce root clutter and avoid unrelated diffs across improvement cycles.

title: Add actionlint validation for GitHub Actions workflows
description: Extend CI validation to parse and lint workflow YAML beyond syntax-only checks, catching invalid action expressions before PRs merge.
